page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.6xlarge is an x86_64 architecture server powered by a dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB processor. It features 24 physical cores and 24 vCPUs running at a base clock speed of 3.3 GHz, supported by 96.0 GB of RAM, which equates to 4.0 GB of memory per core. The CPU includes 33 MB of L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and AVX512_BF16. It operates on a KVM hypervisor and does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware.

Performance benchmarks place this instance in the average tier for most compute tasks, with a Geekbench multi-core score of 10254.0 and a Passmark CPU score of 25408.19. However, its memory subsystem performs in the top 25% tier, as indicated by a Passmark memory score of 2847.06 and a read-only small block memory bandwidth of 1393.09 GB/sec. Network performance is anchored by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. For lightweight AI workloads, it achieves 79.41 tokens per second for text generation using a small 135M LLM model.

Given its dedicated CPU allocation and strong memory performance relative to its standard 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.hfg7.6xlarge offers balanced resource density for production environments. The lack of bundled local storage requires reliance on external block storage, which is a key architectural tradeoff. This configuration is well-suited for general-purpose workloads, web serving, database operations, and software compilation tasks that benefit from dedicated Intel Xeon cores and high memory bandwidth without requiring GPU acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.6xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server featuring 24 Intel Xeon 8369HB vCPUs running at 3.3 GHz, paired with 96.0 GB of RAM. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Network throughput is rated at an 8 Gbps baseline. Benchmark data highlights strong memory performance, with a Passmark memory score in the top 25% tier, alongside average multi-core compute capabilities. The server supports advanced vector extensions like AVX-512 for optimized mathematical operations. Due to its dedicated CPU allocation and high memory bandwidth, the ecs.hfg7.6xlarge is suited for general-purpose applications, database operations, static web serving, and software compilation.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.6xlarge is a dedicated x86_64 server with 24 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 96 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, offering strong memory performance for general-purpose workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.hfg7.6xlarge features 24 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 96 GB RAM, and KVM virtualization, delivering strong memory performance for general workloads.
tagline: A dedicated 24-core Intel Xeon server offering balanced compute and strong memory performance for general-purpose enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 24 dedicated Intel Xeon 8369HB vCPUs running at 3.3 GHz
96.0 GB of system memory with strong top-tier bandwidth performance
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
No bundled local storage or GPU hardware
Supports AVX-512 and AVX512_BF16 instruction sets
Suited for database operations, web serving, and software compilation
